Home Shop beans Our story

Single-origin beans, roasted to order

Acme Coffee sources directly from small farms in Ethiopia, Colombia, and Guatemala. Every bag is roasted within 48 hours of shipping. Below is a quick guide to what we offer and how to brew it.

What we roast

Light, medium, and dark roasts across four single-origin beans. Each bag includes the farm name, varietal, processing method, and tasting notes printed on the label.

How to brew

For pour-over, use 18 grams of medium-fine ground coffee with 300 grams of water at 96 degrees Celsius. Bloom for 30 seconds, then pour in three steady additions over two and a half minutes. Stir twice, then let it draw down.

Ordering and shipping

Orders ship Monday through Friday from our Brooklyn roastery. Domestic delivery typically arrives within three business days. International orders take seven to fourteen days depending on customs.
